request: Implement Pattern B for the Eleventy site so a single deployed artifact works at both /baseline/ (project-page URL) and / (custom domain root). Add a `rel` filter to eleventy.config.cjs that converts root-style paths to page-relative paths using this.page.url to compute depth; sweep all internal href/src in templates to use the filter; add tests/site-relative-paths.test.mjs (filter unit tests + HTML walker smoke test); add site-src/CNAME for baseline.friedbotstudio.com and an eleventy passthrough copy. External URLs and fragment links pass through the filter unchanged. The smoke test catches future regressions structurally.
note: Chore-track refactor + test infra + config. The chore skill handles internal routing through simplify / integrate / document / archive based on its conditional triggers (diff touches eleventy.config.cjs code → simplify fires; new tests + behavior change → integrate fires; new build artifact (CNAME) → archive bundles; user-facing site behavior unchanged for the project URL until deployed → document likely no-op). Out-of-scope: DNS configuration, repo Pages settings flip, deploy trigger — operator actions after this lands.
